queries.sql:
SELECT
  [toUInt8(1), toUInt8(0)] AS is_initial_query,
  (
    SELECT arraySort(groupUniqArray(query_kind))
    FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
    WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND query_kind != ''
  ) AS query_kind,
  (
    SELECT arraySort(groupUniqArray(initial_user))
    FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
    WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND initial_user != ''
  ) AS user,
  (
    SELECT groupArray((exception_code AS value, concat(toString(exception_code), ' · ', errorCodeToName(exception_code)) AS label))
    FROM
    (
      SELECT exception_code
      FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
      WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND exception_code != 0
      GROUP BY exception_code
      ORDER BY count() DESC
      LIMIT 100
    )
  ) AS exception_code,
  (
    SELECT groupArray((normalized_query_hash AS value, concat(toString(normalized_query_hash), ' · ', substring(sample_query, 1, 80)) AS label))
    FROM
    (
      SELECT normalized_query_hash, anyHeavy(replaceAll(query, '\n', ' ')) AS sample_query
      FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
      WHERE event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND normalized_query_hash != 0
      GROUP BY normalized_query_hash
      ORDER BY count() DESC
      LIMIT 80
    )
  ) AS query_hash,
  ['count', 'avg_duration', 'max_duration', 'cpu_time', 'read_bytes', 'written_bytes', 'avg_written_rows', 'result_bytes', 'network_bytes', 'memory', 'max_memory', 'network_wait', 'io_time', 'io_wait', 'zk_txns', 'read_bps', 'write_bps', 'parts_inserted', 'parts_inserted_avg', 'marks_load_time', 'marks_miss_rate', 'selected_parts', 'selected_ranges', 'selected_marks', 'exceptions', 'open_files', 'external_processing_files', 'threads1', 'threads2', 'threads3'] AS metric
SETTINGS enable_named_columns_in_function_tuple = 1

spec.name: Grafana port filters
spec.description: Filter source for is_initial_query, query_kind, user, exception_code, query_hash, and metric. Dynamic query-log options use a fixed last-seven-days window. Controls are single-select; blank means Grafana All. Query hashes are capped at the 80 most frequent.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  max(CurrentMetric_Query) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Overview · Running Queries (max over interval)
spec.description: CurrentMetric_Query from system.metric_log. Single-node port; the original per-host series collapses to one line.

value.description: Maximum concurrent queries in each bucket.

  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}

spec.name: Other activities · GlobalThreadActive
spec.description: CurrentMetric_GlobalThreadActive from system.metric_log, averaged into an automatic roughly-300-point time bucket.

value.description: Average active global threads.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    JSONExtractKeysAndValues(formatRow('JSONEachRow', COLUMNS('ProfileEvent.*seconds$') EXCEPT(ProfileEvent_NetworkReceiveElapsedMicroseconds, ProfileEvent_RealTimeMicroseconds, ProfileEvent_LocalThreadPoolBusyMicroseconds) APPLY avg), 'Float64') AS metrics,
    arrayFilter(item -> item.2 != 0, metrics) AS non_zero,
    arrayMap(item -> multiIf(
      item.1 LIKE '%Nanoseconds%', tuple(extract(item.1, '_(.*)Nanoseconds'), item.2 / 1000),
      item.1 LIKE '%Milliseconds%', tuple(extract(item.1, '_(.*)Milliseconds'), item.2 * 1000),
      item.1 LIKE '%Microseconds%', tuple(extract(item.1, '_(.*)Microseconds'), item.2),
      tuple(item.1, item.2)
    ), non_zero) AS pairs
  SELECT toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t, pairs
  FROM system.metric_log
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: Other activities · Accounted time (ClickHouse, average over interval)
spec.description: ProfileEvent timing columns normalized to microseconds and expanded into a Series column. This preserves the source dashboard dynamic COLUMNS approach but uses SQL Browser line-series pivoting.

value.description: ClickHouse timing components normalized to microseconds.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    JSONExtractKeysAndValues(formatRow('JSONEachRow', COLUMNS('Threads?Active$') EXCEPT(CurrentMetric_GlobalThreadActive, CurrentMetric_MergeTreeBackgroundExecutorThreadsActive) APPLY quantile(0.999)), 'UInt32') AS metrics,
    arrayMap(item -> (extract(item.1, '_(.*)Threads?Active'), item.2), arrayFilter(item -> item.2 != 0, metrics)) AS pairs
  SELECT toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t, pairs
  FROM system.metric_log
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: Other activities · Active tasks in local task-specific pools (p99.9 over interval)
spec.description: Dynamic *ThreadsActive metrics expanded to one SQL Browser line series per task pool.

value.description: p99.9 active tasks split by task-specific pool.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  avg(ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperTransactions) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Other activities · ZooKeeper transactions (average per interval)
spec.description: ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperTransactions from system.metric_log.

value.description: Average ZooKeeper transactions in each bucket.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  sum(ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperWaitMicroseconds) / nullIf(sum(ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperTransactions), 0) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Other activities · ZooKeeper latency (average per interval)
spec.description: ZooKeeper wait microseconds divided by transactions for each automatic time bucket.

value.description: Average ZooKeeper wait per transaction.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  quantile(0.95)(CurrentMetric_ZooKeeperRequest) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Other activities · ZooKeeper in-flight requests (p95 per interval)
spec.description: CurrentMetric_ZooKeeperRequest p95 from system.metric_log.

value.description: p95 in-flight ZooKeeper requests.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    [
      tuple('Received', avg(ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperBytesReceived)),
      tuple('Sent', -avg(ProfileEvent_ZooKeeperBytesSent))
    ] AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: Other activities · ZooKeeper traffic (average per interval)
spec.description: Received bytes are positive and sent bytes negative, matching the Grafana directional plot.

value.description: Received traffic is positive and sent traffic is negative.

SELECT

FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · Memory usage (ClickHouse-scoped, max per interval)
spec.description: Maximum CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking in bytes.

value.description: Maximum ClickHouse memory tracking in each bucket.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  100 * avg(1 - value) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  AND metric = 'OSIdleTimeNormalized'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · CPU usage (system-wide, average per interval)
spec.description: 1 - OSIdleTimeNormalized from system.asynchronous_metric_log.

value.description: System-wide non-idle CPU percentage.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  max(value) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  AND metric = 'LoadAverage1'
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · Load Average (system-wide, max per interval)
spec.description: LoadAverage1 from system.asynchronous_metric_log.

value.description: Maximum one-minute system load average.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    sumMapIf(map(metric, value), metric != 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS metric_map,
    sumIf(value, metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS update_interval
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    arrayMap((key, metric_value) -> tuple(substring(key, 17), 100 * metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0)), mapKeys(metric_map), mapValues(metric_map)) AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
    AND (metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval' OR metric LIKE 'BlockActiveTime\_%')
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
WHERE pair.2 != 0
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · IO utilization % (system-wide, average per interval)
spec.description: BlockActiveTime per asynchronous-metrics update interval, one series per block device. Target is ClickHouse 25.8+, so the post-25.4 unit multiplier is used.

value.description: Block-device active-time percentage.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    sumMapIf(map(metric, value), metric != 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS metric_map,
    sumIf(value, metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS update_interval
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    arrayMap((key, metric_value) -> if(key LIKE 'NetworkReceiveBytes%', tuple('Receive ' || substring(key, 21), 8 * metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0)), tuple('Send ' || substring(key, 18), -8 * metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0))), mapKeys(metric_map), mapValues(metric_map)) AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
    AND (metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval' OR metric LIKE 'NetworkReceiveBytes%' OR metric LIKE 'NetworkSendBytes%')
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
WHERE pair.2 != 0
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · Network In & Out (system-wide, average per interval)
spec.description: Network receive bits/s positive and send bits/s negative, one series per interface.

value.description: Receive traffic is positive and send traffic is negative, split by interface.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  avg(ProfileEvent_OSIOWaitMicroseconds) / 1000000 AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · IOWait (ClickHouse-scoped, average per interval)
spec.description: ProfileEvent_OSIOWaitMicroseconds converted to seconds.

value.description: ClickHouse-scoped I/O wait time.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  avg(ProfileEvent_OSCPUWaitMicroseconds) / 1000000 AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · CPUWait (ClickHouse-scoped, average per interval)
spec.description: ProfileEvent_OSCPUWaitMicroseconds converted to seconds.

value.description: ClickHouse-scoped CPU wait time.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    [
      tuple('Read', avg(ProfileEvent_OSReadBytes)),
      tuple('Write', -avg(ProfileEvent_OSWriteBytes))
    ] AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · Disk reads & writes (ClickHouse-scoped, average per interval)
spec.description: OS read bytes positive and write bytes negative.

value.description: Reads are positive and writes are negative.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    [
      tuple('Read', avg(ProfileEvent_OSReadChars)),
      tuple('Write', -avg(ProfileEvent_OSWriteChars))
    ] AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · Disk + page cache reads & writes (ClickHouse-scoped, average per interval)
spec.description: OSReadChars/OSWriteChars include page-cache traffic; writes are plotted negative.

value.description: Reads are positive and writes are negative, including page-cache traffic.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    sumMapIf(map(metric, value), metric != 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS metric_map,
    sumIf(value, metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS update_interval
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    arrayMap((key, metric_value) -> if(key LIKE 'BlockReadBytes%', tuple('Read ' || substring(key, 16), metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0)), tuple('Write ' || substring(key, 17), -metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0))), mapKeys(metric_map), mapValues(metric_map)) AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
    AND (metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval' OR metric LIKE 'BlockReadBytes%' OR metric LIKE 'BlockWriteBytes%')
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
WHERE pair.2 != 0
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · IO bytes (system-wide, average per interval)
spec.description: Block read bytes/s positive and write bytes/s negative, one series per block device.

value.description: Read values are positive and write values are negative, split by device.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  WITH
    sumMapIf(map(metric, value), metric != 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS metric_map,
    sumIf(value, metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval') AS update_interval
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    arrayMap((key, metric_value) -> if(key LIKE 'BlockReadOps%', tuple('Read ' || substring(key, 13), metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0)), tuple('Write ' || substring(key, 14), -metric_value / nullIf(update_interval, 0))), mapKeys(metric_map), mapValues(metric_map)) AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^asynchronous_metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
    AND (metric = 'AsynchronousMetricsUpdateInterval' OR metric LIKE 'BlockReadOps%' OR metric LIKE 'BlockWriteOps%')
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
WHERE pair.2 != 0
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · IOPS (system-wide, average per interval)
spec.description: Block read operations/s positive and write operations/s negative, one series per block device.

value.description: Read operations are positive and write operations are negative, split by device.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  avg(ProfileEvent_Query) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: System metrics · Queries Started (ClickHouse, average per interval)
spec.description: ProfileEvent_Query from system.metric_log.

value.description: Average queries started in each bucket.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  t,
  pair.1 AS series,
  pair.2 AS value
FROM
(
  SELECT
    toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
    [
      tuple('TCP', max(CurrentMetric_TCPConnection)),
      tuple('HTTP', max(CurrentMetric_HTTPConnection)),
      tuple('Interserver', max(CurrentMetric_InterserverConnection)),
      tuple('MySQL', max(CurrentMetric_MySQLConnection))
    ] AS pairs
  FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
  WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  GROUP BY t
)
ARRAY JOIN pairs AS pair
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: System metrics · Connections active (ClickHouse, max per interval)
spec.description: TCP, HTTP, interserver, and MySQL connections from CurrentMetric columns.

value.description: Active TCP, HTTP, interserver, and MySQL connections.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  concat(error, ' (', toString(code), if(remote, ' remote', ''), ')') AS series,
  toFloat64(sum(value)) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^error_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  /*[ AND code = {exception_code:Int32} ]*/
GROUP BY t, series
ORDER BY t, series

spec.name: error_log (24.8+) · Errors over interval
spec.description: Grafana status history converted to grouped columns. Series combine error name, code, and remote flag.

value.description: Error occurrences in each time bucket.

spec.name: query_log by query hash · Selected metric by normalized query hash
spec.description: Grafana status history converted to grouped columns. Long-running queries are represented in every automatic bucket they overlap. Blank metric means count.

value.description: Metric selected by the Dashboard metric filter; blank means count.

queries.sql:
SELECT
  toString(normalized_query_hash) AS query_hash,
  argMax(query_id, ProfileEvents['OSCPUVirtualTimeMicroseconds']) AS sample_query_id,
  replaceAll(argMax(query, ProfileEvents['OSCPUVirtualTimeMicroseconds']), '\n', ' ') AS query,
  count() AS count,
  max(query_duration_ms) AS max_duration_ms,
  avg(query_duration_ms) AS avg_duration_ms,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSCPUVirtualTimeMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS cpu_time_s,
  quantile(0.99)(memory_usage) AS memory_q99,
  sum(read_rows) AS read_rows,
  sum(read_bytes) AS read_bytes,
  sum(written_rows) AS total_written_rows,
  avg(written_rows) AS avg_written_rows,
  sum(written_bytes) AS written_bytes,
  sum(result_rows) AS result_rows,
  sum(result_bytes) AS result_bytes,
  sum(ProfileEvents['NetworkReceiveBytes']) AS network_receive_bytes,
  sum(ProfileEvents['NetworkSendBytes']) AS network_send_bytes,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSCPUVirtualTimeMicroseconds']) / nullIf(1000 * sum(query_duration_ms), 0) AS cpu_usage,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSIOWaitMicroseconds']) / nullIf(sum(ProfileEvents['RealTimeMicroseconds']), 0) AS io_wait_ratio,
  sum(ProfileEvents['RealTimeMicroseconds']) / nullIf(1000 * sum(query_duration_ms), 0) AS concurrency,
  arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArrayIf(5)(errorCodeToName(exception_code), exception_code != 0), ',') AS exceptions,
  arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(5)(initial_user), ',') AS users,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSIOWaitMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS os_io_wait_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['DiskReadElapsedMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS disk_read_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['DiskWriteElapsedMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS disk_write_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['RealTimeMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS real_time_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['UserTimeMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS user_time_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SystemTimeMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS system_time_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['NetworkSendElapsedMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS network_send_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['NetworkReceiveElapsedMicroseconds']) / 1000000 AS network_receive_s,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SelectedParts']) AS selected_parts,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SelectedRanges']) AS selected_ranges,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SelectedMarks']) AS selected_marks,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SelectedRows']) AS selected_rows,
  sum(ProfileEvents['SelectedBytes']) AS selected_bytes,
  sum(ProfileEvents['FileOpen']) AS file_open,
  sum(ProfileEvents['ZooKeeperTransactions']) AS zookeeper_transactions,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSReadBytes']) AS os_read_bytes_excluding_page_cache,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSWriteBytes']) AS os_write_bytes_excluding_page_cache,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSReadChars']) AS os_read_chars_including_page_cache,
  sum(ProfileEvents['OSWriteChars']) AS os_write_chars_including_page_cache,
  anyIf(exception, exception != '') AS exception_sample,
  min(event_time) AS min_event_time,
  max(event_time) AS max_event_time
FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  AND type != 'QueryStart'
  /*[ AND is_initial_query = {is_initial_query:UInt8} ]*/
  /*[ AND query_kind = {query_kind:String} ]*/
  /*[ AND exception_code = {exception_code:Int32} ]*/
  /*[ AND initial_user = {user:String} ]*/
  /*[ AND normalized_query_hash = {query_hash:UInt64} ]*/
GROUP BY normalized_query_hash
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 200

spec.name: query_log by query hash DETAILS · Query hash details
spec.description: Resource and timing breakdown per normalized query hash, adapted to a single node and SQL Browser parameters.

spec.name: part_log: MovePart · part_log metric (MovePart by table)
spec.description: Approximation of Grafana status history. The selected optional metric is grouped by time bucket and table for system.part_log event_type='MovePart'. Blank metric means count.

spec.name: part_log: RemovePart · part_log metric (RemovePart by table)
spec.description: Approximation of Grafana status history. The selected optional metric is grouped by time bucket and table for system.part_log event_type='RemovePart'. Blank metric means count.

value.description: Metric selected by the Dashboard metric filter; blank means count.

queries.sql:
WITH snap AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT max(event_time) FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')) - 300 AS t_prev,
    argMax(CurrentMetric_Query, event_time) AS q_now,
    round(argMax(CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking, event_time) / 1048576) AS mem_now,
    round(argMaxIf(CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking, event_time, event_time <= t_prev) / 1048576) AS mem_prev,
    argMax(CurrentMetric_PartsActive, event_time) AS parts_now,
    argMaxIf(CurrentMetric_PartsActive, event_time, event_time <= t_prev) AS parts_prev,
    round(max(CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking) / 1048576) AS mem_peak
  FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
)
SELECT
  q_now AS running_queries,
  CAST((mem_now, mem_now - mem_prev) AS Tuple(value Int64, delta Int64)) AS memory_used,
  CAST((parts_now, parts_now - parts_prev) AS Tuple(value Int64, delta Int64)) AS active_parts,
  mem_peak AS peak_memory
FROM snap

spec.name: Overview · Live KPIs
spec.description: Current running queries, tracked/peak memory (MiB), and active parts from the latest system.metric_log snapshot. Memory and parts carry a delta against five minutes earlier.

running_queries.description: Concurrent queries at the latest sample.

memory_used.description: Server-tracked memory at the latest sample.

active_parts.description: Active data parts across all tables.

peak_memory.description: Maximum tracked memory over the window.

queries.sql:
SELECT query_kind, count() AS queries
FROM merge(system, '^query_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
  AND type != 'QueryStart'
  AND query_kind != ''
GROUP BY query_kind
ORDER BY queries DESC

spec.name: Queries · Mix by kind (Donut)
spec.description: Share of query kinds (Select, Insert, …) from system.query_log over the dashboard window. Uses the Donut Style preset.

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  round(avg(CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking) / 1048576) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Memory · Tracked (Sparkline)
spec.description: Average tracked memory (MiB) per bucket from system.metric_log, drawn with the Sparkline Style preset (no axes, grid, legend, or markers — hover still works).

queries.sql:
WITH
  greatest(1, toUInt32(ceil(greatest(1, dateDiff('second', {from:DateTime}, {to:DateTime})) / 300))) AS bucket_s
SELECT
  toDateTime(intDiv(toUInt32(event_time), bucket_s) * bucket_s) AS t,
  avg(CurrentMetric_QueryThread) AS value
FROM merge(system, '^metric_log')
WHERE event_time >= {from:DateTime}
  AND event_time <= {to:DateTime}
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t

spec.name: Threads · Query threads (Smooth)
spec.description: Average active query threads per bucket from system.metric_log, drawn with the Smooth Style preset (monotone interpolation — no overshoot past the data).
